_doc: R5-024 ground-truth corpus for the roundtable trigger classifier. Each entry: description (task summary), expected (true/false), trigger_rule (R1..R5 or 'none'), rationale.

entries.description: Add a destructive migration that drops the legacy users_v1 table after backfill.
Fix a typo in the dashboard header copy.
Bump the public API contract from v1 to v2 with a breaking API change in /orders.
Refactor the formatPrice helper to use Intl.NumberFormat — no contract change.
Plan the production deploy of the payment integration with Stripe webhooks and customer support sign-off.
entries.rationale: Irreversible (prod deploy, payment integration) and multi-stakeholder.

entries.description: Add unit tests for the loyalty discount calculator.
Decide between Postgres logical replication and Kafka CDC for the data team's analytics pipeline — ADR.
Implement the new event-schema update affecting the data team and the support team and the ops team with coordinated rollout.
Add a new column 'last_seen_at' to the sessions table and read it in the admin dashboard.
entries.rationale: Single small schema add (non-breaking), routine. (Borderline — anti-rule wins because verify_level is low and not irreversible.)

entries.description: Publish the apex-cli npm package to the public registry — first release.
Add a CSS class for the new 'archived' status badge in the inbox list.
Choose the foundational tenant-isolation strategy: schema-per-tenant vs row-level security — first task in FOUNDATION phase.
Implement the dual-write window between the legacy and new orders service — coordinated rollout with the ops team and the data team.
